note: Held-out release cases. Disjoint queries from the development split (cases_dev.json). Reserve these for release decisions; do not tune against them.

cases.query: creating a new API key in the dashboard settings
cases.why_sufficient: auth-api-keys describes creating a key under Settings, Keys.

cases.query: revoke the previous key after generating a replacement
cases.why_sufficient: auth-key-rotation describes generating a new key and revoking the old one.

cases.query: exchange client id and secret for a token
cases.why_sufficient: auth-oauth describes exchanging client credentials at the token endpoint; token-expiry is supporting lifetime context.

cases.query: minutes until the OAuth token is no longer valid
cases.why_sufficient: auth-token-expiry gives the 60 minute expiry.

cases.query: why am I getting a 403 on some endpoints
cases.why_sufficient: auth-scopes ties a 403 to a missing scope; api-errors is supporting error-body context.

cases.query: steady rate versus burst allowance for the limiter
cases.why_sufficient: ratelimit-burst contrasts steady rate with the token-bucket burst.

cases.query: what does the Retry-After header mean
cases.why_sufficient: ratelimit-429 explains Retry-After tells you how long to wait.

cases.query: reading X-RateLimit-Remaining to throttle myself
cases.why_sufficient: ratelimit-headers names the remaining-quota header used for self-throttling.

cases.query: how is the enterprise plan priced
cases.why_sufficient: billing-plans says Enterprise is custom priced.

cases.query: which response codes are billable
cases.why_sufficient: billing-usage-metering says 2xx and 3xx count and 4xx do not.

cases.query: set a cap to stop spending past a limit
cases.why_sufficient: billing-overage describes the spending cap that blocks requests.

cases.query: download the monthly invoice as a PDF
cases.why_sufficient: billing-invoices describes the monthly PDF invoice download.

cases.query: store data only in the eu-west region
cases.why_sufficient: storage-regions lists eu-west and the residency guarantee.

cases.query: are encryption keys rotated automatically
cases.why_sufficient: storage-encryption says Aurora manages and rotates keys automatically.

cases.query: how often are automated backups taken
cases.why_sufficient: storage-backups states a backup every 24 hours.

cases.query: restore an object from trash within seven days
cases.why_sufficient: storage-retention describes the 7 day recoverable trash and restore.

cases.query: HMAC signature header on webhook deliveries
cases.why_sufficient: webhooks-signing names the HMAC-SHA256 Aurora-Signature header.

cases.query: how long does webhook retry backoff continue
cases.why_sufficient: webhooks-retries gives the up-to-24-hour backoff window.

cases.query: service credits when uptime drops below the SLA
cases.why_sufficient: sla-uptime ties service credits to falling below the uptime SLA.

cases.query: email support response time on the Pro plan
cases.why_sufficient: sla-support gives Pro email support within one business day.

cases.query: follow the next_cursor to get the following page
cases.why_sufficient: api-pagination describes following next_cursor until it is null.

cases.query: how long is an Idempotency-Key response stored
cases.why_sufficient: api-idempotency says the first response is stored for 24 hours.
